name: slop-review
description: Single-plugin marketplace exposing slop-review as a plugin for Claude Code and Codex CLI.

plugins.name: slop-review
plugins.description: Native diff review window (Monaco + Glimpse) for AI coding agents. Adds the /slop-review slash command in Claude Code, a `slop-review` skill in Codex CLI, and a pi extension exposing the same `/slop-review` command.
